phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audio guides
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde recogen las audioguías disponibles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh reh-KOH-hen lahs ow-dyoh-GHEE-ahs dee-spoh-NEE-bles?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de información, a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the information desk, by the entrance.

responses.english: At the information desk, by the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: En el mostrador de información, a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed in galleries
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se permite tomar fotografías dentro de las galerías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, seh per-MEE-teh toh-MAR foh-toh-GRAH-fee-ahs DEN-troh deh las gah-leh-REE-ahs?

likely_response.local: Fotos sin flash, sí. Prohibido en obras señalizadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: FOH-tohs SEEN FLAHS SÍ proh-ee-BEE-doh EHN OHB-rahs seh-nyah-lee-THAH-dahs
likely_response.translation_en: Flash prohibited. Check signs in each room.

responses.english: Flash prohibited. Check signs in each room.
responses.phonetic: FOH-tohs SEEN FLAHS SÍ proh-ee-BEE-doh EHN OHB-rahs seh-nyah-lee-THAH-dahs
responses.local: Fotos sin flash, sí. Prohibido en obras señalizadas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy timed entry tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar entradas con hora específica?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh kom-PRAHR en-TRAH-dahs kohn OH-rah eh-speh-see-FEE-kah

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, at the back.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
responses.local: En la taquilla principal, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the rooftop terrace is open
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿la terraza de la azotea está abierta?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, lah teh-RAH-sah deh lah ah-soh-TEH-ah es-TAH ah-BYER-tah?

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the main panel.

responses.english: It is indicated on the main panel.
